series_metadata.series_description: Applications, correspondence, proposals, committee meeting minutes, and supporting and related materials.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years, after audited by State Auditor and report is released, send to the Ohio Historical Society (State Archives) for historical evaluation if records are not of historical value, store with agency record storage (National Archival Services) for 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Archives
